ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "dominant_eye" TEXT /* Dominant eye of the participant (L for left, R for right) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health conditions that may affect the experiment */,
  "consent_form_id" TEXT /* ID of the consent form signed by the participant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the participant (encrypted for security) */,
  "recruitment_source" TEXT /* Source from which the participant was recruited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which the trial belongs */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number within the experiment */,
  "sub_trial" INTEGER /* Sub-trial identifier */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the trial (e.g., Complete, Incomplete) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made during the trial */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used in the trial */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial for which the response was given */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who provided the response */,
  "same_different" TEXT /* Indicates if the items presented were the same or different (S/D) */,
  "congruency" TEXT /* Congruency of the trial (e.g., C, I) */,
  "alignment" TEXT /* Alignment of the trial (e.g., A, M) */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Indicates if the response was correct (true/false) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant in their response */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations related to the response */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to respond (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_times" (
  "reaction_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction time entry */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response associated with this reaction time */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Time taken by the participant to respond (in seconds) */,
  "study_duration" REAL /* Duration of the study phase */,
  "target_duration" REAL /* Duration of the target display */,
  "mask_duration" REAL /* Duration of the mask display */,
  "trial_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial ended */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations related to the reaction time */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to record the reaction time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_times_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "face_groups" (
  "face_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each face group */,
  "face_image" TEXT /* Path to the face image used in the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the face group */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the face images */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the faces in the group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the faces in the group */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution in the face group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("face_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with this study */,
  "study_upper" TEXT /* Images related to upper study conditions */,
  "study_lower" TEXT /* Images related to lower study conditions */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date the study was conducted */,
  "study_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the study */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations related to the study */,
  "data_quality" INTEGER /* Rating for the quality of the data collected during the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to this log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was logged */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., Start, End, Error, Note) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "logged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations related to the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
